detectors.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract DSProxy (DSProxy.sol#207-321) has payable functions:
	 - DSProxy.fallback() (DSProxy.sol#221-223)
	 - DSProxy.execute(bytes,bytes) (DSProxy.sol#229-253)
	 - DSProxy.execute(address,bytes) (DSProxy.sol#257-295)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:

	 - [DSProxy.execute(bytes,bytes)](DSProxy.sol#L229-L253)
	 - [DSProxy.execute(address,bytes)](DSProxy.sol#L257-L295)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
